'''鈭歵h-g-th-r''' ('''kathagtheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:char|char]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-g-th-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:char|char]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-g-th-r
|-
! Lemma
| kathagtheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithagtheroko|thithagtheroko]] || [[word:jithagtheroko|jithagtheroko]] || [[word:shithagtheroko|shithagtheroko]] || [[word:kithagtheroko|kithagtheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthagtheroko|thuthuthagtheroko]] || [[word:jujuthagtheroko|jujuthagtheroko]] || [[word:shushuthagtheroko|shushuthagtheroko]] || [[word:kukuthagtheroko|kukuthagtheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthagtheroko|thuthagtheroko]] || [[word:juthagtheroko|juthagtheroko]] || [[word:shuthagtheroko|shuthagtheroko]] || [[word:kuthagtheroko|kuthagtheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthagtheroko|thuthagtheroko]] || [[word:juthagtheroko|juthagtheroko]] || [[word:shuthagtheroko|shuthagtheroko]] || [[word:kuthagtheroko|kuthagtheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethagtheroko|thethagtheroko]] || [[word:jethagtheroko|jethagtheroko]] || [[word:shethagtheroko|shethagtheroko]] || [[word:kethagtheroko|kethagtheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothagtheroko|thothothagtheroko]] || [[word:jojothagtheroko|jojothagtheroko]] || [[word:shoshothagtheroko|shoshothagtheroko]] || [[word:kokothagtheroko|kokothagtheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothagtheroko|thothagtheroko]] || [[word:jothagtheroko|jothagtheroko]] || [[word:shothagtheroko|shothagtheroko]] || [[word:kothagtheroko|kothagtheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothagtheroko|thothagtheroko]] || [[word:jothagtheroko|jothagtheroko]] || [[word:shothagtheroko|shothagtheroko]] || [[word:kothagtheroko|kothagtheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thagtheroko|th忙thagtheroko]] || [[word:j忙thagtheroko|j忙thagtheroko]] || [[word:sh忙thagtheroko|sh忙thagtheroko]] || [[word:k忙thagtheroko|k忙thagtheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathagtheroko|thathathagtheroko]] || [[word:jajathagtheroko|jajathagtheroko]] || [[word:shashathagtheroko|shashathagtheroko]] || [[word:kakathagtheroko|kakathagtheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathagtheroko|thathagtheroko]] || [[word:jathagtheroko|jathagtheroko]] || [[word:shathagtheroko|shathagtheroko]] || [[word:kathagtheroko|kathagtheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathagtheroko|thathagtheroko]] || [[word:jathagtheroko|jathagtheroko]] || [[word:shathagtheroko|shathagtheroko]] || [[word:kathagtheroko|kathagtheroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathagtherithi|shathagtherithi]] || [[word:shathagtheriji|shathagtheriji]] || [[word:shathagtherishi|shathagtherishi]] || [[word:shathagtheriki|shathagtheriki]]
